item.title: Starting the Day on the Farm
item.description: Farm operations begin with equipment checks and field preparation as a new day of agricultural work gets underway.

media:content.media:title: Starting the Day on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Farm operations begin with equipment checks and field preparation as a new day of agricultural work gets underway.

item.title: Starting Irrigation Pivots on the Farm
item.description: Getting irrigation pivots running for the season, preparing fields with water management systems to support healthy crop growth.

media:content.media:title: Starting Irrigation Pivots on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Getting irrigation pivots running for the season, preparing fields with water management systems to support healthy crop growth.

item.title: Driving a Case Tractor on the Farm
item.description: Operating a Case tractor during daily farm work, showcasing field tasks, machinery handling, and life during a busy farming season.

media:content.media:title: Driving a Case Tractor on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Operating a Case tractor during daily farm work, showcasing field tasks, machinery handling, and life during a busy farming season.

item.title: Getting the Farm Load Ready
item.description: Preparing and securing a farm load for transport, highlighting teamwork, equipment setup, and the logistics behind daily agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: Getting the Farm Load Ready
media:content.media:description: Preparing and securing a farm load for transport, highlighting teamwork, equipment setup, and the logistics behind daily agricultural work.

item.title: Beaver Dam Removal on the Farm
item.description: Removing a beaver dam to improve water flow and protect farmland, showcasing problem-solving and land management during farm operations.

media:content.media:title: Beaver Dam Removal on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Removing a beaver dam to improve water flow and protect farmland, showcasing problem-solving and land management during farm operations.

item.title: Finding a Promising Fit on the Farm
item.description: Exploring a promising new fit for farm operations, focusing on teamwork, equipment, and finding the right solution for the job.

media:content.media:title: Finding a Promising Fit on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Exploring a promising new fit for farm operations, focusing on teamwork, equipment, and finding the right solution for the job.

item.title: Loading Farm Trucks with Precision
item.description: Carefully loading trucks during farm operations, highlighting efficiency, equipment control, and the precision needed for daily agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: Loading Farm Trucks with Precision
media:content.media:description: Carefully loading trucks during farm operations, highlighting efficiency, equipment control, and the precision needed for daily agricultural work.

item.title: Protecting the Sweet Corn Harvest
item.description: Working to protect a sweet corn harvest through careful field management, timing, and problem-solving during a busy farming season.

media:content.media:title: Protecting the Sweet Corn Harvest
media:content.media:description: Working to protect a sweet corn harvest through careful field management, timing, and problem-solving during a busy farming season.

item.title: Fishing Moment on the Farm
item.description: A relaxing break from farm work leads to a successful catch, blending outdoor recreation with everyday life in the countryside.

media:content.media:title: Fishing Moment on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A relaxing break from farm work leads to a successful catch, blending outdoor recreation with everyday life in the countryside.

item.title: It’s My Pleasure on the Farm
item.description: A positive moment from daily farm life, highlighting teamwork, gratitude, and the rewarding experiences that come with agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: It’s My Pleasure on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A positive moment from daily farm life, highlighting teamwork, gratitude, and the rewarding experiences that come with agricultural work.

item.title: Budget Farm Shop Transformation
item.description: Upgrading and organizing a farm shop on a budget, focusing on practical improvements, workspace efficiency, and hands-on problem-solving.

media:content.media:title: Budget Farm Shop Transformation
media:content.media:description: Upgrading and organizing a farm shop on a budget, focusing on practical improvements, workspace efficiency, and hands-on problem-solving.
